mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_time) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, now()) ON CONFLICT (notice_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice n WHERE n.create_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_read nr WHERE nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} ) AND ( -- 全量通知：所有人可见 n.scope_type = 1 -- 班级通知：只有属于该班级的用户可见 OR (n.scope_type = 3 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_class_rel ucr WHERE ucr.user_id = #{userId} AND ucr.class_id = COALESCE((n.scope_data ->> 'classId')::bigint, -1) )) -- 院系通知：只有属于该院系的用户可见 OR (n.scope_type = 2 AND ( SELECT department_id FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} ) = COALESCE((n.scope_data ->> 'departmentId')::bigint, -1)) -- 个人通知：指定用户可见 OR (n.scope_type = 4 AND (n.scope_data ->> 'userId')::text = #{userId}::text) )
